version_description: My first time to make one

versions.version_description: Based off the album version, Slash chords included, Chords synced with the Lyrics or underscores(beats) (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wg92RrNhB8s).

This arrangement was made with a more jazz way. It is not that difficult to play the chords, but you need to know at least the basics of how to play. In addition, it is necessary to use a capo on the first fret.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I was a liar[/tab]
I gave in to the fire
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I know I should've fought it[/tab]
At least I'm being honest
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Feel like a failure[/tab]
'Cause I know that I failed you
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I should've done you better[/tab]
'Cause you don't want a liar


[Refrain]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
She gives you everything,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But, boy, I couldn't give it to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
And I know, and I know, and I know[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
That you got everything,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
But I got nothing here without you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#dim[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
So  one  last      time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I need to be the one who takes you home[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F#dim[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
One  more    time[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I promise, after that, I'll let you go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I don't care if you got her in your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
All I really care is you wake up in my arms[/tab]

One  last   time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I need to be the one who takes you home[/tab]


[Verse 2]

I know I don't deserve it,
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
But stay with me a minute[/tab]
I swear I'll make it worth it
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Can't you forgive me?[/tab]
At least just temporarily
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I know that this is my fault[/tab]
I should've been more careful
